name: [Placeholder] Highland Homestay
teaser: A working home in Bosnia's highest village, where dinner is whatever the family is eating.
description: [PLACEHOLDER] Describe what makes this stay worth it — the host, the food, the silence at 1,500 metres. No television, no menu, just a place at the table.

name: [Placeholder] Old Town Boutique Hotel

description: [PLACEHOLDER] Comfort without losing character — family-run, in a restored building, with breakfast that is reason enough to book.

name: [Placeholder] Riverside Guesthouse
teaser: Wake up to the sound of an emerald river and a host who knows every bend of it.
description: [PLACEHOLDER] What makes this stop worth a night rather than a photo — the river, the trout, the family's stories.

description: [PLACEHOLDER] A comfortable base for the high country — wood fires, big windows, and trailheads from the door.
